assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls builder.AddSqlServer() to create a SQL Server resource
Program.cs calls .AddDatabase() to create a database resource from the SQL Server
The IdentityServer project uses both .WithReference(identityDb) and .WaitFor() for the SQL Server or database resource
assertions.rationale: Code shows `.WithReference(identityDb).WaitFor(sqlServer)` on the IdentityServer project

assertions.assertion: The Weather API project uses both .WithReference(identityServer) and .WaitFor(identityServer)
assertions.rationale: Code shows `.WithReference(identityServer).WaitFor(identityServer)` on the weather-api project

assertions.assertion: The Web App project uses both .WithReference(identityServer) and .WaitFor(identityServer)
assertions.rationale: Code shows `.WithReference(identityServer).WaitFor(identityServer)` on the web-app project
